intro: High-level summaries suitable for a public portfolio. Customer-specific numbers and internal codenames stay off this page unless you choose to add them.

items.title: Personalization decisioning pipeline
items.tagline: Recommendations and decisions across Salesforce Core and Data Cloud.
items.problem: Marketers need reliable ways to retrieve and apply recommendations—what to show, offer, or do next—grounded in their customer data and activation workflows.
items.contribution: Built much of the Salesforce Core–side setup with my immediate team: admin experience, services, and integration points that let customers operationalize personalization end to end.
items.outcome: Delivered a profitable line within its first year (public-safe summary; treat specifics as confidential unless approved for sharing).
